name: GOLFTEC Huntsville
address: 1115 McMurtrie Dr NW Suite C, Huntsville, AL 35806
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training studio focused on personalized instruction using advanced technology. Their Huntsville location, part of a larger network, utilizes OPTIMOTION motion-capture systems, launch monitors, and high-speed video analysis to provide detailed swing feedback and club fittings. Services are tailored for long-term improvement, with certified coaches creating personalized game plans for players of all skill levels. The studio emphasizes a structured approach to learning, starting with a Swing Evaluation to build a foundation for progress.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven coaching using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA-level coaches
One-stop shop for lessons, practice, and custom club fitting
Ability to pause lesson packs for up to 60 days for added flexibility

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fittings and launch data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, for lessons and practice you should bring your own clubs. However, club rentals may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC does not offer traditional 18-hole play; it focuses on lessons, practice, and fittings in bays with simulators and technology.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs and technology suitable for junior golfers and youth development.
